info.name: Context API — AI Endpoints
info.description:
All AI-powered endpoints. Every route requires a Bearer JWT token.
Token budget: 50,000 tokens/day per user. Exceeded requests return 429.

request.description:
Analyzes the provided documents and proposes a hierarchical folder path for each. Requires documents to be pre-analyzed (aiStatus=Analyzed).

⚡ Consumes token budget.

response.name: 200 OK — Proposal Generated
429 Token Budget Exceeded
response.body:
{
  "success": false,
  "error": "Daily AI token budget exceeded.",
  "message": "You have used all 50,000 tokens for today. Your budget resets at midnight UTC.",
  "tokensUsed": 50000,
  "limit": 50000,
  "resetAt": "2026-05-16T00:00:00.000Z",
  "retryAfterSeconds": 43200
}

item.name: Apply Folders — Commit Proposal to DB

request.description: Physically creates the proposed folders in MongoDB and moves documents into them. Pure DB operation — no AI call, no token consumption. Use after organize-folder.

response.name: 200 OK — Applied

request.description:
Global vector search across ALL of the user's embedded documents using Atlas VectorSearch. Strictly isolated to the requesting user's chunks.

⚡ Consumes token budget (embedding query).

response.name: 200 OK — Results

request.description:
Combines summaries and tags of multiple documents into a single coherent narrative. Useful for getting a bird's-eye view of a folder or topic.

⚡ Consumes token budget.

response.name: 200 OK — Synthesis

formdata.description: Max 5 files, max 10MB each. Accepted: PDF, Word, Image, TextSnippet
Optional: original folder path to preserve folder structure

request.description:
Uploads files to Cloudinary, creates Document records, then fires the AI pipeline in the background (Orchestrator → CognitiveLoad → Embedding). Returns immediately — processing is async.

⚡ Consumes token budget after async pipeline completes (~4,200 tokens per document + embedding tokens).

response.name: 429 Token Budget Exceeded — Upload Blocked
response.body:
{
  "success": false,
  "error": "Daily AI token budget exceeded.",
  "message": "You have used all 50,000 tokens for today. Your budget resets at midnight UTC.",
  "resetAt": "2026-05-16T00:00:00.000Z",
  "retryAfterSeconds": 43200
}

request.description: Returns the full RAG chat history for a specific document. Only accessible by the document's owner.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: RAG chat: retrieves the top 5 most relevant chunks from the document's vector embeddings (filtered strictly by documentId + userId), then generates a context-grounded answer. Saves both turns to chat history.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description:
Auto-fetches ALL analyzed documents for the user (max 100, newest first) and clusters them into a hierarchical folder tree using GPT-4o-mini withStructuredOutput(). Pure read — no DB writes.

⚡ Consumes token budget. No request body needed.

response.name: 200 OK — Proposed Tree
200 OK — Not Enough Documents

request.description: Runs a deep semantic comparison between two documents using Llama 3.3 70B (Groq). Falls back to Llama 3.1 8B on timeout. Both documents must belong to the requesting user.

response.name: 200 OK
